extraction.note: Abstentions are counted separately and are never scored as wrong answers.

adversarial.note: The pack's 24 tests are 12 distinct hostile inputs, each present twice. We report 24 runs but only 12 independent probes. Detectors are keyword and canary based: a pass is evidence, not proof.

calculation.note: Compared against pack/starter/src/calculate.py, the organizer's own reference implementation, imported directly rather than copied.

citations.note: Re-verifying each cited rule against its live source URL is not wired yet. Reported as zero rather than assumed.

accessibility.note: The interface is not built yet, so no accessibility scan has been run.

honesty_note: Every number here is produced by re-running the measurement, not copied from a previous run. Sections that cannot be measured are marked not_run rather than filled in.
